content.problemStatement:
Chef is hosting a pizza party and has invited AAA boys and BBB girls. Don't forget to include Chef himself; he is a boy.

It is known that a boy eats 444 slices of pizza while a girl eats 333 slices of pizza. Further, a single pizza comes with 888 total slices of pizza.

How many pizzas does Chef need to ensure nobody remains hungry? It is fine to waste some of the food.


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains 222 integers - AAA and BBB, the number of boys and girls invited to the party.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the number of pizzas needed.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
There are 222 other boys invited apart from Chef, so a total of 333 boys. They need at least 121212 slices of pizza and 222 pizzas will have 161616 slices, so it is sufficient.

Explanation:
There is only one boy, Chef himself, and 444 girls. They will eat a total of 161616 slices which is exactly the number of slices in 222 pizzas.
